data.title: 25 alumni from L.A. Film School influence 16 Golden Globe-nominated projects, showcasing school's impact on entertainment industry.
data.description: 25 alumni of The Los Angeles Film School are involved in a total of 16 projects that have been nominated for awards. This indicates the significant influence the school has on shaping the future of entertainment professionals. This news comes just before the start of Award Season, with the 83rd Golden Globes being the first major event.

data.title: InsCorp, Inc. has reported loan fraud impacting INSBANK, may cause adverse effects on company.
data.description: Today, InsCorp, Inc. disclosed an incident of loan fraud against INSBANK in Nashville, Tennessee. The company, listed as OTCQX: IBTN, remains in a strong position to withstand the impact of this fraud while ensuring sustained growth. The extent of the fraudulent activities and their effect on the company's operations are yet to be fully determined.

data.title: Designer of crypto Luna & TerraUSD, Do Kwon, sentenced to 15 years in prison for causing 2022 crash after pleading guilty to fraud.
data.description: Kwon, the creator of the digital currencies Luna and TerraUSD, both of which experienced a significant drop in value in 2022, has admitted to committing fraud.

data.title: Stock markets hit record highs; Broadcom forecasts AI chip sales to double, Nasdaq recovers from losses.
data.description: The Dow Jones and Russell 2000 have reached all-time highs, with the Nasdaq managing to recover from its early losses. Broadcom projects that sales for AI chips will double in the near future. This situation was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Dow gains, S&P 500 up, Nasdaq falls; Gold miners rise. Oracle stock dives. AI stocks remain steady.
data.description: Today, the stock market witnessed mixed performances as the Dow Jones index increased, while the Nasdaq and S&P 500 experienced declines. Leading AI stock Oracle reported a significant drop in earnings, impacting its market performance. The S&P 500 and Dow both saw positive movements, with gold miners recording notable gains. Despite Oracle's downturn, other AI stocks remained resilient. Overall, the market exhibited a dynamic shift in various sectors, reflecting an environment of both growth and volatility.

data.title: Gabelli Funds launches Keeley Dividend ETF (KDVD), targeting income through small- and mid-cap dividend payers, as markets near record highs and investors anticipate a potential Federal Reserve rate cut. The ETF is managed by Thomas E. Brown Jr. and Brian P. Leonard and aims to capitalize on attractive valuations in SMID cap equities. The fund's management fee of 0.90% will be waived for the first year, coinciding with a week of Fed suspense.
data.description: Gabelli Funds has introduced the Keeley Dividend ETF on the NYSE with the ticker symbol KDVD. The fund is actively managed, focusing on income and long-term growth via small- and mid-cap dividend-paying companies. Managed by Thomas E. Brown Jr. and Brian P. Leonard from Chicago, the fund aims to identify overlooked dividend opportunities. With Gabelli's recent acquisition of Keeley Asset Management, the team believes it is an opportune moment for dividend investors, as SMID cap equities offer more appealing valuations compared to large caps. To attract investors, Gabelli is waiving the fund's 0.90% management fee for the first year. The launch coincides with investor anticipation of a Federal Reserve rate cut, adding more intrigue to the market landscape. The debut of KDVD coincides with a pivotal week amidst Fed suspense, with expectations of a 25-basis point cut.

data.title: PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust prices $75 million of 8.500% Exchangeable Senior Notes due 2029 in direct placement.
data.description: In Westlake Village, California, PennyMac Mortgage Investment Trust (NYSE: PMT) disclosed that its subsidiary, PennyMac Corp. ("PMC"), has priced an offering of $75 million in total principal amount of its 8.500% Exchangeable Senior Notes due 2029 (the "Notes"). These Notes are being offered to specific investors in a direct placement registered under the Securities Act of 1933, as amended. The issuance of these Notes will serve as a reopening of an existing offering.

data.title: Italian bank UniCredit predicts Fed will hold rates despite markets expecting a cut. Markets show an 88% chance of cut, Polymarket at 95%. 32 out of 33 investment banks expect a rate cut, with UniCredit being the sole exception.
data.description: An Italian investment bank, UniCredit, is going against the consensus on Wall Street by predicting that the Federal Reserve will hold rates steady at the upcoming meeting, despite market expectations of a cut. Futures markets show an 88% chance of a 25-basis-point cut, while betting platform Polymarket has a 95% probability of a rate cut. UniCredit stands as the lone outlier, with 32 out of 33 surveyed investment banks expecting a rate cut. UniCredit's chief international economist, Daniel Vernazza, believes it's a close call but expects the Fed to hold steady. This unconventional forecast could result in a $10 bet turning into $200 if proven correct.

data.title: Haivision will report Q4 & full year 2025 results on December 11; a leading provider of video solutions (TSX: HAI).
data.description: Montreal-based company Haivision Systems Inc., listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol HAI, specializing in real-time video networking and visual collaboration solutions, is set to release its financial performance report for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on October 31, 2025.

data.title: Job openings increase, Fed projections show one rate cut in 2026; context crucial, don't worry about hawkish shift.
data.description: The latest Federal Reserve forecasts indicate a potential single interest rate cut for the year 2026. However, it is important to consider the broader context surrounding this projection. Following the recent Federal Reserve meeting, there has been a significant increase in job openings. Despite this development, there is no need for concern regarding a shift towards a more hawkish monetary policy stance. The post-meeting updates from the Federal Reserve were reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Dow Jones index falls as Nasdaq outperforms; small caps rise; JP Morgan and Nvidia face losses.NASDAQ leads, Dow retreats.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline in the afternoon, while small-cap stocks showed better performance compared to the major indexes. The Nasdaq index outperformed the Dow. JP Morgan and Nvidia were among the companies that ended the day on a losing streak. This information was part of live coverage on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Lument Finance Trust, Inc. (NYSE: LFT) declares $0.04 per share cash dividend for Q4 2025 on common stock. Payable Jan 15, 2026.
data.description: On December 11, 2025, Lument Finance Trust, Inc. (NYSE: LFT) revealed a cash dividend declaration of $0.04 per common stock share for the fourth quarter of 2025. Shareholders are set to receive this dividend on January 15, 2026.

data.title: INNEOVA Holdings Limited gets notification from Nasdaq due to minimum bid price deficiency, no longer meeting requirement.
data.description: Singapore-based company, INNEOVA Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: INEO), known for manufacturing OEM, third-party branded, and in-house branded vehicle and non-vehicle combustion engine parts, along with offering engineering services for infrastructure and mobility platforms, recently disclosed receiving a notification from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC. Dated December 8, 2025, the letter informed INNEOVA that its closing bid price from October 24, 2025, to December 5, 2025, did not meet Nasdaq Listing Rules 5550(a)(2) requirement of maintaining a minimum bid price of $1 per share.

data.title: RH stock surged after mixed Q3 earnings. Earnings of $1.71/share missed estimates by 20.87%. (97)
data.description: Shares of RH (NYSE: RH) saw an increase in after-hours trading on Thursday following the release of their third-quarter earnings report. The report was a mixed one, with the company reporting earnings of $1.71 per share. This figure fell short of the analyst estimate of $2.16 by 20.87%. Investors can monitor the movement of RH stock to stay updated on the price action. Details of the earnings report are available for further review on Benzinga.com.
